dialogue.audio_note: 雨声环境音，提示音，突然的引擎轰鸣
dialogue.audio_note_en: Rain ambience, notification ping, sudden loud engine rev
dialogue.lines: 三倍配送费？备注说……多带冰，要冰镇五条尾巴？……只要钱到位，阎王殿我也送！
dialogue.lines_en: Triple delivery fee? Note says... bring extra ice, need to freeze five tails? ...As long as the money is right, I'll deliver to Hell itself!
dialogue.speaker: 主角
dialogue.tone: 从困惑转为贪婪和决绝
dialogue.tone_en: Confused turning to greedy and determined

image_prompts.character: cinematic character portrait, young delivery rider, yellow tactical jacket, rain-wet helmet with visor up, greedy expression, neon lighting, photorealistic, 8k, upper body
image_prompts.first_frame: cinematic film frame, close-up, delivery rider looking at phone with confused expression, rain falling, neon city background, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, close-up, delivery rider grinning with excitement, hand twisting throttle, motion blur on background, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.scene: cinematic scene background, rain-slicked city street at night, blurred neon lights, wet asphalt, cyberpunk atmosphere, no people, empty scene, 8k

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic close-up, night, rain-slicked city street, young delivery rider in yellow tactical jacket and helmet looking at glowing smartphone screen. Raindrops slide down the visor. His expression shifts from confusion to greedy excitement as he sees the price. He grips the handlebars tight and revs the throttle. Neon lights reflect on the wet helmet. 8k resolution, high contrast, cyberpunk atmosphere.
shots.visual_description_standard: 骑手看手机 → 见天价瞳孔地震 → 狞笑轰油门

dialogue.audio_note: 碎石脚步声，低沉金属撞击声，深沉低吼
dialogue.audio_note_en: Footsteps on gravel, low metal clashing sound, deep growl
dialogue.lines: 有人吗？你的'冰美式'到了……该死，连个鬼影都没有。
dialogue.lines_en: Anyone here? Your 'Iced Americano' is here... Damn, not even a ghost in sight.
dialogue.speaker: 主角

image_prompts.character: cinematic character portrait, delivery rider holding flashlight, nervous expression, yellow jacket covered in dust, dark background, photorealistic, 8k
image_prompts.first_frame: cinematic film frame, medium shot, rider walking through demolition zone with flashlight, beam cutting darkness, eerie atmosphere, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, medium shot, rider stopping and looking around in fear, flashlight illuminating twisted metal, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.scene: cinematic scene background, abandoned demolition zone at night, twisted metal and concrete piles, thick fog, spooky atmosphere, cold moonlight, no people, empty scene, 8k

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic tracking shot, abandoned urban demolition zone at night, piles of twisted rebar and concrete, thick volumetric fog. The delivery rider walks cautiously holding a flashlight, the beam cutting through the dust. The atmosphere is eerie and silent. 8k, horror movie lighting, cold blue tones.
shots.visual_description_standard: 骑手踏入废墟 → 手电扫视残骸 → 驻足打颤

dialogue.audio_note: 巨大咆哮，撞击声，瓦砾崩塌声
dialogue.audio_note_en: Loud roar, impact sound, crashing debris
dialogue.lines: 又是拆迁队的走狗！滚！……卧槽！尾巴？五条？！
dialogue.lines_en: Another dog from the demolition team! Get out! ... Holy crap! Tails? Five of them?!
dialogue.speaker: 狰（巨兽）
dialogue.tone: 巨兽：咆哮/心灵感应。主角：惊恐尖叫。

image_prompts.character: cinematic character portrait, delivery rider in mid-roll, terrified face, dirt on face, dynamic action pose, photorealistic, 8k

image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, low angle, rider on ground looking back in terror, dust settling, debris scattered, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.scene: cinematic scene background, destroyed ground in demolition zone, impact crater, dust cloud, debris in air, dynamic lighting, no people, empty scene, 8k

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic action shot, low angle. A massive shadow of a beast with five tails lunges from the darkness. The delivery rider clumsily rolls on the ground to dodge. Debris explodes where he was standing. Dust flies everywhere. Fast camera movement, motion blur, intense conflict. 8k, high shutter speed look.
shots.visual_description_standard: 黑影扑杀 → 骑手翻滚极限闪避 → 地面炸裂

dialogue.lines_en: The demolition team's... all must die.
dialogue.speaker: 狰（巨兽）

image_prompts.character: cinematic creature portrait, mythical beast Zheng from Shan Hai Jing, red leopard-like body with black cloud patterns, single white jade spiral horn glowing, five tails fanning out like peacock (left1 crimson with sparks, left2 cyan with wind trails, center gold with lightning, right2 purple with poison mist, right1 transparent with ice crystals), golden vertical pupils, fierce expression, photorealistic, 8k, full body
image_prompts.first_frame: cinematic film frame, medium shot, Zheng emerging from dust and smoke, five tails spreading majestically, horn glowing, golden eyes locked on camera, moonlight through broken windows, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, medium shot, Zheng standing proudly, all five tails fully displayed with elemental effects visible, imposing stance, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.scene: cinematic scene background, abandoned demolition zone interior, moonlight streaming through broken roof, dust particles floating, mystical atmosphere, no people, empty scene, 8k

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic medium shot, mythical beast Zheng from Shan Hai Jing emerges from dust and smoke. Red leopard-like body with black cloud patterns, single white jade spiral horn glowing with soft light. Five tails fan out majestically like a peacock display - leftmost tail crimson red with floating sparks, second tail cyan blue with swirling wind trails, center tail golden with crackling lightning, fourth tail purple with dripping poison mist, rightmost tail transparent crystal with frost patterns. Golden vertical pupils locked on camera with fierce intensity. Moonlight streams through broken windows illuminating the scene. Chinese mythology aesthetic, fantasy style, 8k, dramatic lighting, vertical 9:16 format.
shots.visual_description_standard: 狰从烟尘中缓步走出 → 五尾如孔雀开屏展开 → 独角发光锁定主角

dialogue.audio_note: 粗重喘息，巨兽低吼戛然而止
dialogue.audio_note_en: Heavy breathing, beast growling stops abruptly
dialogue.lines: 赤豹，五尾，一角……你是狰？我不是来拆迁的！我是来给'章峨山'的尾巴送冰的！
dialogue.lines_en: Red leopard, five tails, one horn... You are Zheng? I'm not here to demolish! I'm here to deliver ice for the tails of 'Mount Zhang'e'!
dialogue.speaker: 主角

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic medium close-up. The delivery rider is half-kneeling, terrified but shouting. He holds up the insulated delivery bag like a shield in front of him. In the foreground, the blurry silhouette of a red leopard-like beast looms. Rim lighting highlights the rider's desperate face. 8k, dramatic lighting.
shots.visual_description_standard: 骑手狂吼设定 → 猛推外卖箱 → 巨兽顿住

dialogue.audio_note: 冰块落地清脆声，巨兽疑惑低鸣
dialogue.audio_note_en: Ice cubes clinking sound, beast confused grunt
dialogue.speaker: 狰（巨兽）

image_prompts.character: cinematic creature portrait, mythical beast Zheng close-up, golden vertical pupils contracted to thin slits, expression changing from anger to surprise, five tails stiff upright, one tail accidentally knocking over coffee cup, ice cubes spilling, beast awkwardly lifting foot,反差萌表情, photorealistic, 8k
image_prompts.first_frame: cinematic film frame, close-up, Zheng's face, angry expression with bared teeth, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, close-up, Zheng's pupils contracted to thin lines, surprised expression, one tail knocking coffee cup, ice on ground, foot lifting awkwardly, 8k, vertical 9:16 format

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic close-up of mythical beast Zheng's face. Golden vertical pupils suddenly contract to thin lines. Expression changes from fierce anger to surprised confusion. Five tails that were attacking freeze stiff upright. One tail accidentally knocks over a coffee cup in foreground, ice cubes spill out and splash onto the beast's own foot. It awkwardly lifts that foot and hops slightly.反差萌 moment, Chinese fantasy style, 8k, comedic timing, vertical 9:16 format.
shots.visual_description_standard: 狰瞳孔收缩成细线 → 五尾僵直竖起 → 尾巴打翻咖啡杯 → 冰块洒脚跳开

dialogue.audio_note: 风啸声，碎石崩塌，魔幻风铃声
dialogue.audio_note_en: Whoosh of wind, crashing rocks, magical chime
dialogue.lines_en: Should've said so earlier. Leave the ice, the road is cleared.
dialogue.speaker: 狰（人声）

image_prompts.character: cinematic character portrait, delivery rider standing still, back to camera, watching destruction, silhouette, photorealistic, 8k
image_prompts.first_frame: cinematic film frame, wide shot, five elemental tails entering frame, hitting concrete pile, explosion of dust, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.last_frame: cinematic film frame, wide shot, cleared path through ruins, settling dust, magical particles fading, 8k, vertical 9:16 format
image_prompts.scene: cinematic scene background, demolition zone, magical elemental energy trails, flying concrete debris, clearing path, dynamic action, no people, empty scene, 8k

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Cinematic wide shot. Five massive elemental tails sweep across the screen from the side - the crimson fire tail with floating sparks, the cyan wind tail with swirling air currents, the golden lightning tail with crackling electricity, the purple poison tail with dripping venom, and the transparent ice tail with frost crystals. Heavy concrete slabs and twisted metal are swept away effortlessly like dust. The path clears instantly. Dust swirls in the magical elemental energy. The rider stands small in the background, watching in awe. 8k, VFX heavy, magical realism, Chinese fantasy style.
shots.visual_description_standard: 五元素巨尾横扫 → 废墟崩飞 → 通路显现（火尾带火星/风尾卷气流/雷尾缠电光/毒尾滴粘液/冰尾凝霜花）

dialogue.audio_note: 诡异风声，低沉贝斯轰鸣，数字故障音
dialogue.audio_note_en: Eerie wind, deep bass drone, digital glitch sound
dialogue.lines: 订单完成。等等……定位显示'章峨路44号'？这座城市底下，到底埋了多少《山海经》里的怪物？
dialogue.lines_en: Order complete. Wait... the location shows '44 Zhang'e Road'? Just how many monsters from 'Shan Hai Jing' are buried beneath this city?
dialogue.speaker: 主角

Camera pulls back and up rapidly (drone shot) to reveal the demolition zone ruins forming the shape of an ancient mythological structure, overlaid with the modern city lights. Cyber-mythology aesthetic. 8k, grand scale.
shots.visual_description_standard: 手机地图特写 → 镜头高空后拉 → 揭示古城布局
